name: slop-skills
description: Two focused Codex code-review skills: Deslop changes code; Slopmeter only reviews it.

interface.shortDescription: Clean code or review it without touching it.
interface.longDescription: Deslop applies behavior-preserving cleanup. Slopmeter performs a research-first, strictly read-only product review.
defaultPrompt: Use $slopmeter to review this PR without changing code.
